charter.phase_name: V1.12AR CPO Feature Implementation Patch Spec Freeze
charter.mission: Freeze the minimum bounded implementation rule set for daily board series and recurring future catalyst calendar before any row-geometry widen.
success_criteria: all 6 bounded patch rules are frozen
each rule has point-in-time and audit posture
next lawful move becomes bounded implementation backfill on current truth rows

interpretation: V1.12AR exists to stop the project from hiding implementation ambiguity behind broad model wins.
This is the smallest lawful freeze needed before any row-geometry widen.
